query:
-- Mark the 6 stuck scenes as failed
UPDATE musicVideoScenes
SET mvSceneStatus = 'failed',
    errorMessage = 'Atlas Cloud timeout — scene did not complete within expected window. Please retry.',
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE id IN (510038, 510043, 510070, 510071, 510073, 510074)
  AND mvSceneStatus = 'generating';

-- Cancel all open providerJobLogs for these scenes
UPDATE providerJobLogs
SET pjlStatus = 'cancelled'
WHERE sceneId IN (510038, 510043, 510070, 510071, 510073, 510074)
  AND pjlStatus IN ('submitted', 'failed');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3XWfTC2fh8LVhku.root --database ALJHDNsuNA7bExFuoQZUsx --execute -- Mark the 6 stuck scenes as failed
UPDATE musicVideoScenes
SET mvSceneStatus = 'failed',
    errorMessage = 'Atlas Cloud timeout — scene did not complete within expected window. Please retry.',
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE id IN (510038, 510043, 510070, 510071, 510073, 510074)
  AND mvSceneStatus = 'generating';

-- Cancel all open providerJobLogs for these scenes
UPDATE providerJobLogs
SET pjlStatus = 'cancelled'
WHERE sceneId IN (510038, 510043, 510070, 510071, 510073, 510074)
  AND pjlStatus IN ('submitted', 'failed');
